items.title: The Cleveland Cavaliers have exercised their fourth-year team option on guard Craig Porter Jr. He appeared in a career-high 64 games (three starts) last season for Cleveland, averaging 4.5 points, 3.4 rebounds, and 3.2 assists in 17.9 minutes per game.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Cleveland Cavaliers have exercised their fourth-year team option on guard Craig Porter Jr. He appeared in a career-high 64 games (three starts) last season for Cleveland, averaging 4.5 points, 3.4 rebounds, and 3.2 assists in 17.9 minutes per game.
